Event: Winter Festival 2025
Event Date: 01/12/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: D31
Thunderous Light Daggers

When attacking, has a 17% chance of dealing 150% damage in 5 seconds.
The unit's attack have a 65% chance of poisoning the target for 4 sec. Poisoned enemy units receive 975000 magic damage for 4 sec., have their attack speed and the damage they deal reduced by 15% every second. Stacks up to 4 times.

When the owner of the daggers poisons an enemy unit, that unit additionally receives 813000 pure damage. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects. The ability only triggers once per 1 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌝🌚
